Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Directs the metropolitan transportation authority and the New York city transit authority to rename the 116th Street - Lexington Avenue subway station to the 116th Street - Tito Puente station
Summary: Directs the metropolitan transportation authority and the New York city transit authority to rename the 116th Street - Lexington Avenue subway station to the 116th Street - Tito Puente station.
ActClause: AN ACT directing the metropolitan transportation authority and the New York city transit authority to rename the 116th Street - Lexington Avenue subway station to the 116th Street - Tito Puente station; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
